datavalue.value: Minister for Culture, Community and Youth
Minister for Culture, Community and Youth

wikipedia.title: Edwin Tong
wikipedia.extract: Edwin Charles Tong Chun Fai is a Singaporean politician and lawyer who has been appointed as Minister for Law and Second Minister for Home Affairs concurrently in 2025.
wikipedia.extract_html: Edwin Charles Tong Chun Fai is a Singaporean politician and lawyer who has been appointed as Minister for Law and Second Minister for Home Affairs concurrently in 2025.
